evidence: Although random forests are trained and Table 2 acknowledges RF "feature importance: error improvement obtained from splits using certain feature" (impurity-based MDI), the paper does not analyze or report impurity importance rankings. Instead, feature importance analysis (Figure 6B) uses elastic net coefficients: "We chose elastic nets for this analysis due to the straightforward interpretation of their coefficients." Main conclusions concern ML/DR algorithm performance and model complexity trade-offs, not feature ranking: "Elastic nets using features obtained through PCA yielded the smallest test MSE for 76 of 179 investigated drugs."
